name: Cold Oriental Noodles with Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Chinese rice wine, or sherry
1 1/2 tablespoons rice vinegar, or other vinegar
1 tablespoon light brown sugar, firmly packed
1 cucumber peeled & cut lengthwise, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghettini al dente.
2. Drain and rinse under cold water.
3. Drain very well again.
4. Toss the noodles with 2 tablespoons of the sesame oil. Cover and chill until ready to combine with the peanut sauce, or up to 24 hours.
5. To make the sauce, combine the remaining 2 tablespoons sesame oil with all the other ingredients except the cucumber and scallions. Beat until well mixed.
6. The sauce can be kept in the refrigerator, covered, up to 24 hours before using.
7. Just before serving, gently toss the noodles with the sauce, cucumbers, and half the scallions. Garnish with the remaining scallion.
